title: eragrostis pilosa var. lugens
intro: Eragrostis pilosa var. lugens, also known as Lug's love grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Eragrostis pilosa var. lugens can be prepared as an infusion or decoction to make herbal teas or tonics, and it is also used in some traditional remedies.
